name: egaop
description: Enterprise-Grade Agent Orchestration Platform — The Kubernetes of AI Agents

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w control-plane/api-server" "npm run dev -w control-plane/secret-store" "npm run dev -w execution-plane/llm-router" "npm run dev -w execution-plane/sandbox-runtime" "npm run dev -w execution-plane/tool-proxy" "npm run dev -w memory-plane" "npm run dev -w observability-plane"
